title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as a method for iterative self-improvement in software development. The video argues that while not universally applicable, AutoResearch introduces a novel perspective on improving software through automated research and refinement cycles.
